name: Jelly
description: Trembling cubes of jelly mid-wobble — each one squashes and stretches to a new posture per redraw, gloss bar riding on top.

code.style: --jelly: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 12%; border-radius: 26%; background: var(--jelly); opacity: 0.85; transform: scale(@rand(0.82, 1.08), @rand(0.82, 1.08)); transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 26%; width: 36%; top: 22%; height: 9%; border-radius: 99px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65); transform: rotate(@rand(-6deg, 6deg)); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
